word: H6323 - פּוּן - pûwn - poon - Be distracted

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּן

Transliteration: pûn

Phonetic: poon

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to be perplexed, be distracted
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: a primitive root meaning to turn, i.e. be perplexed

TWOT entry: 1744

Part(s) of speech: Verb
